name: Employer says no comp insurance after my machine accident, options?
description: State fund or sue boss directly.

mainEntity.name: Employer says no comp insurance after my machine accident, options?

acceptedAnswer.text: State fund or sue boss directly.
acceptedAnswer.description: File against Utah/Idaho Uninsured Employers Fund; sue employer personally.[2] Key factors: Verify status; labor dept helps. Stronger case for full damages.
